generated_oml:
instance AccelerometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Accelerometer embedded in the vehicle chassis to capture vibration and acceleration data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AccelerometerDataTransmitted
]

instance GyroscopeSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Gyroscope embedded in the vehicle to record angular velocity of the chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GyroscopeDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor embedded in the drivetrain to measure torque output."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AccelerometerSensor
]

instance GyroscopeDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GyroscopeSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance AccelerometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped acceleration data stream produced by the onboard accelerometer."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEngineEnabler
]

instance GyroscopeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped gyroscopic data stream produced by the onboard gyroscope."
    DTDFVocab:fromData GyroscopeDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEngineEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped torque data stream produced by the onboard torque sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEngineEnabler
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Parametric solid CAD model of the vehicle chassis, including wheel diameter, chassis shape, and styling attributes."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model defined by differential equations representing vehicle dynamics under applied forces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical component encoding static force‑distance relationships."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEngineEnabler
]

instance CalibrationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine that receives raw sensor data, runs calibration algorithms, and updates model parameters."
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance SimulationEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation engine that solves the vehicle’s differential equations and generates predictive states."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

instance ControlEngineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control engine that receives updated model parameters and supervisory commands to actuate the physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that calibrates the virtual model parameters to align with real‑world sensor measurements."
    DTDFVocab:provides DiagnosticsInsight, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs predictive simulations to forecast future vehicle states under current operating conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides ForecastInsight
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that applies supervisory control algorithms for safety and performance optimization."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlDecisionAction
]

instance DiagnosticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from sensor‑driven calibration to diagnose discrepancies between physical and virtual behavior."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action that updates operating parameters in the physical twin based on calibration results."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ForecastInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing forecasted vehicle states based on predictive simulation outputs."
]

instance ControlDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action that adjusts actuators in the physical twin to enforce safety and optimal performance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin system is orchestrated through a modular architecture that integrates a data ingestion layer (sensor streams from the physical twin), a model calibration module that applies calibration algorithms to update computational models, a monitoring module that uses fault detectors, supervisory controllers, and state estimators to assess safety and performance, and an optimization engine that generates actionable data for the physical twin. These components are coordinated via a central orchestration service that manages resource allocation, synchronizes model updates, and ensures consistency across the digital representation, forming the overall constellation of the DT."
]
